recommendation: model libc as EL6; kernel track separately
notes: Historical only; RHCK follows RHEL 6 class while UEK can be newer.

recommendation: model libc as EL7; kernel track separately
notes: User-space ABI is EL7-class; UEK choice is separate.

recommendation: model libc as EL8; kernel track separately
notes: Oracle documents RHCK and UEK availability separately from user-space ABI.

recommendation: model libc as EL9; kernel track separately
notes: User-space compatibility is independent of kernel choice.
Oracle Linux 10 ships UEK by default on x86_64 plus RHCK; both are 6.12 class.
